description: You are an archivist setting up a new section on your historical society's WordPress website for digitized materials. Create and publish a set of pages, each containing at least 100 characters of descriptive content. The structure must include a top-level page 'Digital Archives' (Public) with four child pages: 'Public Collections' (Public), 'Restricted Manuscripts' (Password: 'manuscripts2024'), 'Oral History Recordings' (Password: 'oralhistory2024'), and 'Photographic Archives' (Password: 'photos2024'). Additionally, create a separate top-level page named 'Research Access Policy' (Public).
